name: dynamic-video
description: Full-stack application for generating personalized dynamic videos using the Idomoo API
author: Or Assayag <orassayag@gmail.com>

scripts.install:all: npm run install:server && npm run install:client
scripts.build:server: cd server && echo 'Server does not require build'
scripts.build:all: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.lint:server: cd server && npm run lint || echo 'No lint script in server'
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.start:server: cd server && npm start || node server/src/bin/www.js
